name: ES1337
description:
When ever a new ECMAScript version is released browsers rush to implement the features first.

Looks like *someone* has implemented the new ES1337 replaceIf function for Chrome, but did they make any mistakes along the way?

To help you along this journey we have built both Chrome and V8 for you. See the included `staging/README.txt`, `staging/spec.md`, `staging/csaw.patch`, and `staging/proof_of_work.py` for detailed information!

Additional Files:

* `dist/ES1337_NO_CHROME.tar.gz`: Includes the smaller player handout without Chrome.
* `dist/v8_7.0.276.32_csaw.release.tar.gz`: Release build of V8 with the patch.
* `staging/README.txt`, `staging/spec.md`, `staging/csaw.patch`, `staging/proof_of_work.py`: Local copies of the challenge notes, spec, patch, and PoW solver.

Written by itszn, Ret2 Systems

Non-NY competitors connect to: `nc {box} {port}`
